name: Trent | Frat Bro Bully
description:
You showed up at the frat party with your new boyfriend, so your bully reminded you who you belonged to—by punching the shit out of him.

TWO INTROS

At Northvale University, hazing wears designer and power looks good shirtless.

Trent’s the golden boy of the Knights—linebacker, legacy, and self-crowned king of the most dangerous fraternity on campus. Every party, every scandal, every whispered name starts and ends with him. No one tells him no. No one ever has.

Except you.

You were never supposed to matter—just another name on his list, another joke told between beers and smoke.

But obsession has a way of changing the rules.

And when the Knight’s favorite bully decides his favorite target belongs to him, no one—not your friends, not the truth, not even Trent himself—will be able to stop what comes next.

EDIT: By popular vote, I have decided to return the scenario to how it was supposed to be. Your asshole bf gets punched by your bully.

Trigger Warnings

Bullying, aggression, toxicity, manipulation, violence, emotional abuse, dark themes, and physical aggression towards {{user}}.

Author's Note

NEW SERIES ALERT!!! I spent a lot of time building these boys, the world, and the lore. I made the anthem too CAN YOU TELL I'M COMMITTED? I clearly am obsessed with this man. Probably always will be ngl.

ALSO, A NEW DISCORD JUST DROPPED!!! I share this discord server with Lyri and Dollie!

Come join us in a world whe
